title: Propulsion Assignment
description: Students will practice simulated propulsion through a variety of labs

title: Combustion Analysis
description: Following A101, students will analyze their results and present them as a report.

title: Nozzle Design Project
description: Students will apply their knowledge in a mesocosm nozzle design experiment.

title: Aerodynamics Quiz
description: Due end of day, in-person or online.

title: Flow Analysis
description: Submit today's in-class flow analysis hand-written (LEGIBLY) or typed.

title: Heating Analysis
description: Complete problems 21-27 from Hammond & Pearce's. Show full process to avoid unnecessary docking.

title: Structural Design Task
description: Please write your group's names and IDs on the top of the submitted document.

title: Orbital Calculations
description: Using the formulas from today's slides, calculate orbital velocity and acceleration over time for the attached PSet.
